title: BUbuisnessAndMarket
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from BUbuisnessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.title: Rampant AI demand for memory is fueling a growing chip crisis
items.description: The cost of one type of DRAM soared 75% from December to January, accelerating price hikes throughout the holiday quarter.

items.title: Cisco CEO says all people who are wildly successful in tech share 3 traits
items.description: Technical chops matter—but Chuck Robbins says EQ and commitment to the team are what really separate top performers in the AI era.

items.title: Blackstone mogul warned of ‘urgent need’ for AI preparedness—Now he’s turning his $48 billion fortune into a top philanthropic foundation
items.description: Stephen Schwarzman is committing his wealth to his foundation, which could become one of the largest in the world.

items.title: OpenAI hires OpenClaw AI agent developer Peter Steinberg
items.description: “Ultimately, I felt OpenAI was the best place to continue pushing on my vision and expand its reach.”

items.title: Warner Bros. weighs reopening sale negotiations with Paramount
items.description: Paramount submitted amended terms last week that addressed several concerns.
